name: DrugOrMedicamentSubstanceCode
title: Drug Or Medicament Substance Code
description:
This subset contains concepts that represent substances that are chemical constituents of pharmaceutical/biological products (excluding vaccines).

This is a broad data exchange subset that is intended to support semantic interoperability and conformance testing. It is recommended that jurisdictions define and implement more specific clinically curated subsets that contain a portion of these concepts for data capture at the point of care for their specific use case.

This subset was defined using the intensional definition of <410942007\|Drug or medicament (substance)\| against the substrate SNOMED CT Canadian Edition.

This resource is an informative value set; a [normative subset](https://fhir.infoway-inforoute.ca/ValueSet/drugormedicamentsubstancecode) containing the expanded values can be found on Canada Health Infoway's [Terminology Server](https://terminologystandardsservice.ca/fhir).  Access to the Terminology Server requires an [InfoCentral account](https://infocentral.infoway-inforoute.ca/en/register).
